abilities.name: Science Guild Support
abilities.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Infantry**^^ units (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability), this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Resource Transmutation
abilities.description: Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, one model with this ability can choose to use it when it is selected to shoot. If it does, you must spend 1YP and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by that model have the [^^**Sustained Hits 1**^^] ability and, after that model has shot this phase, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, you can gain up to 2YP.

abilities.name: Break the Foe
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [^^Sustained Hits 1^^] ability.

abilities.name: Relentless Avalanche
abilities.description: You can target this model's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Cthonian Beserks**^^

abilities.name: Limited Loadout
abilities.description: This model cannot attempt to operate Hatchways and cannot perform Tactical Manoeuvres.

abilities.name: Assault Robot
abilities.description: In the Deploy Armies step, when setting up a unit from your army within an Entry Zone, you can set this model up alongside that unit as if it was part of it, using the same Entry Zone.

abilities.name: Multi-spectral visor
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Brôkhyr Guild Support
abilities.description: While this unit is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Vehicle**^^ or ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks**^^ units, if this unit is not an attached unit, it has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- HEARTHKYN WARRIORS
- BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN

abilities.name: Unit Composition
abilities.description: If this unit’s Brôkhyr Iron‑master model is ever destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining E‑COG models are also destroyed. While embarking within a ^^**Transport^^** and while embarked within a ^^**Transport^^**, each E‑COG model takes up the space of 0 models.

abilities.name: Forgewrought Expertise
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, this model can repair one friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Vehicle, Exoframe^^** or ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks^^** unit within 3" of it. One model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds if this unit contains an Ironkin Assistant model. Each unit can only be repaired once per turn.

abilities.name: Breaching Fire
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Grudge-fuelled Fortitude
abilities.description: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Unhinged Vengeance
abilities.description: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if this model lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6+2".

abilities.name: Cyberstimms
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding one to the result if units from your army have Fortify Takeover: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- EINHYR HEARTHGUARD

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Einhyr
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Mass Driver Accelerators
abilities.description: Each time this model ends a Charge move, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Decisive Destruction
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- HEARTHKYN WARRIORS

abilities.name: Fortify (Psychic)
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Grimnyr's Regard
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann**^^ unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this unit's ^^**Grimnyr**^^ model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Unit Composition
abilities.description: If this unit’s Grimnyr model is ever destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining CORV models are also destroyed. While embarking within a ^^**Transport^^** and while embarked within a ^^**Transport^^**, each CORV model takes up the space of 0 models.’

abilities.name: Luck Has, Need Keeps, Toil Earns
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, until your opponent's Level of Control over that is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Pan-spectral Scanning
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: MultiCOG Targeting
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack's Ballistic Skill characteristic, the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Outflanking Mag-Riders
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Pragmatic Hunters
abilities.description: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6”.'

weapons.name: Hernkyn Yaegir w/ revolver and knife

units.name: Ironkin Steeljacks With Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators

profile.name: Ironkin Steeljacks with Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators
keywords: Ironkin Steeljacks with Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators

abilities.name: Purge Response
abilities.description: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem. If units from your army have Fortify Takeover, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ while resolving that Stratagem instead.

abilities.name: Merciless Eradication
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) that is within Engagement Range of this unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abilities.name: Scanner Uplinks
abilities.description: In your shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Opportunistic Manoeuvre
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal Move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Einhyr Hearthguard, Hearthkyn Warriors**^^

abilities.name: Seized Opportunity
abilities.description: Once per phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit destroys an enemy unit. If it does, you gain 1YP.

abilities.name: Kindred Hero
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

This model can be attached to the following units:

- HEARTHKYN WARRIORS

abilities.name: Seized Opportunity

abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Hearthkyn Warriors**^^

units.name: Memnyr Strategist

abilities.name: Computational Mastermind
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, before you determine if units from your army have Hostile Acquisition or Fortify Takeover, for each objective marker you control that has one or more models with this ability in range of it, you can spend 1YP or gain 1YP.

abilities.name: Predictive Guidance
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when you target this unit with the **Fire Overwatch/Heroic Intervention** stratagem, you can use this ability. If you do, that use of that stratagem is ‑1 CP.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks with Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators^^**, ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks with Melee Weapons^^**

attachTo: Ironkin Steeljacks With Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators

abilities.name: Blistering Advance
abilities.description: Units can disembark from this ^^**Transport^^** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

abilities.name: Enemy Spotted
abilities.description: Each time a model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is within 9" of and visible to any Searchlights from your army, re-roll a Hit of 1 and, if the model making that attack is a Sentry Gun, add 1 to the Hit roll as well.

abilities.name: Wall
abilities.description: This model is a terrain feature and counts as a Wall.

abilities.name: Camera Network
abilities.description: In the Create the Battlefield and Place Objective Markers step, set this terrain feature up in one of the Searchlight positions (marked D2 on the mission map) that does not already contain a Searchlight.

abilities.name: Defensive Emplacement
abilities.description: In the Create the Battlefield and Place Objective Markers step, set this model up in one of the Sentry Gun positions (marked D1 on the mission map).

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks with Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators, Ironkin Steeljacks with Melee Weapons**^^

abilities.name: Forgewrought Skill
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Ancestral Fortune
abilities.description: Once per turn, you can spend 1YP to change one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model to an unmodified 6.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- Einhyr Hearthguard
- Hearthkyn Warriors

abilities.name: Grim Efficiency
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann**^^ unit within 12" of this model is targeted with a Stratagem, this model can use this ability. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.
